title: Add "c " as a short mention trigger
description: Add "c " (lowercase c followed by a space) as a mention trigger so users can type `c what's the weather` instead of `claude: what's the weather`.
acceptanceCriteria: Messages starting with `c ` (lowercase c, then space) trigger the bot, with the `c ` prefix stripped from the query
Existing `claude:` trigger continues to work unchanged
The trigger is added to the default `MENTION_TRIGGERS` config
Works in both real Signal and mock signal server environments
